log: Andariel: Andariel's guard line and poison-heavy boss pressure.
Andariel raises a boss screen. The boss gains 6 Guard, escorts gain 6 Guard, and the boss opener intensifies by 6.
Andariel forms an escort bulwark. Elite and support enemies gain 4 Guard.

Multiple Shot: dealt 59 total damage. Short Bow dealt 15 fire damage across 3 targets. Short Bow dealt 12 poison damage across 3 targets. Short Bow applied 5 Burn to 3 targets. Short Bow applied 3 Slow to 3 targets.
Black Arrow Corrupt Rogue Archer falls.
Multiple Shot: dealt 75 total damage. Short Bow dealt 5 fire damage. Short Bow dealt 4 poison damage. Short Bow applied 5 Burn. Short Bow applied 3 Slow.
Fire Arrow: dealt 24 to Andariel. Short Bow dealt 5 fire damage. Short Bow dealt 4 poison damage. Short Bow applied 5 Burn. Short Bow applied 3 Slow. applied 5 Burn.
Multiple Shot: dealt 25 total damage. Short Bow dealt 5 fire damage. Short Bow dealt 4 poison damage. Short Bow applied 5 Burn. Short Bow applied 3 Slow.
Melee strike hits Andariel for 17 (proficient). Short Bow dealt 6 fire damage. Short Bow dealt 4 poison damage. Short Bow applied 5 Burn. Short Bow applied 3 Slow.
